zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Oldham於1440年出生在英國藍卡爾曼徹斯特時，她的父親Roger Oldham16歲，母親Margery Rogers15歲。她於1461年與Sir Richard Beswicke Knight de la Beche在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1535年在英國維斯特莫藍德肯達爾享年95歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格亞特 曼徹斯特曼徹斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Oldham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from Oldham in Lancashire. The placename derives from Old English ald ‘old’ + Old Norse holmr ‘island, water meadow’.
History: Colonist and trader John Oldham was born in Lancashire, England, c. 1600 and emigrated to North America in 1623, arriving at Plymouth, MA, in July on the ship Anne.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Oldham was born in 1440, in Manchester, Lancashire, England, her father, Roger Oldham, was 16 and her mother, Margery Rogers, was 15. She married Sir Richard Beswicke Knight de la Beche in 1461, in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1535, in Kendal, Westmorland, England, at the age of 95, and was buried in Manchester, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Oldham est née en 1440, à Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Oldham, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Margery Rogers, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Beswicke Knight de la Beche en 1461, à Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1535, à Kendal, Westmorland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 95 ans, et a été enterrée à Manchester, Greater Manchester, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Manchester, Metropolitan Borough of Manc: Manchester, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Oldham 1440 in Manchester, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Oldham 16 und ihre Mutter Margery Rogers 15. Sie hat 1461 in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom Sir Richard Beswicke Knight de la Beche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1535 im Alter von 95 Jahren in Kendal, Westmorland, England und wurde in Manchester, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Sir Richard Beswicke Knight de la Beche nel 1461, nel Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1535, nel Kendal, Westmorland, England, all'età di 95 anni, e fu sepolta a Manchester, Greater Manchester, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Oldhamが1440年にイギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターで生まれた時，父Roger Oldhamは16歳，母Margery Rogersは15歳であった。1461年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドでSir Richard Beswicke Knight de la Becheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1535年にイギリスウエストモーランドケンダルで95歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグレアター マンチェスターマンチェスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Oldham(이)가 1440년 영국 랭카실르 먼체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Oldham(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Rogers(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1461년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드에서 Sir Richard Beswicke Knight de la Beche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1535년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 켄다에서 95세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그리터 먼체스터 먼체스터에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Beswicke Knight de la Beche em 1461, em Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. ro.Manchester, Metropolitan Borough of Manc: Manchester, Greater Manchester, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Oldham родилась в 1440 г. в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger Oldham было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Rogers, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Beswicke Knight de la Beche в 1461 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1535 г. в местности кендаль, вестморланд, Англия в возрасте 95 лет и была похоронена в местности манчестир, гритир манчестир, Англия, Великобритания.
